name: Darwinbox
tagline: AI-first HCM platform for mid-market and enterprise organizations
description: Darwinbox is a new-generation, AI-first human capital management platform that covers the entire employee lifecycle. Its AI engine powers smart resume parsing, intelligent workforce analytics, voice-enabled HR bot, and predictive attrition modeling. Used by 900+ enterprises globally, Darwinbox handles recruitment, core HR, payroll, talent management, and employee engagement with a mobile-first, consumer-grade UX.
